Name: FInputActionKeyMapping
Description: Defines a mapping between an action and key

Variables.Name: bShift
Variables.Description: true if one of the Shift keys must be down when the KeyEvent is received to be acknowledged

Variables.Name: bCtrl
Variables.Description: true if one of the Ctrl keys must be down when the KeyEvent is received to be acknowledged

Variables.Name: bAlt
Variables.Description: true if one of the Alt keys must be down when the KeyEvent is received to be acknowledged

Variables.Name: bCmd
Variables.Description: true if one of the Cmd keys must be down when the KeyEvent is received to be acknowledged

Variables.Name: KeySeq
Variables.Description: key sequence number: 0 for Primary key, 1 for Backup key
